label: Analysis
labelTooltip: You are in the Analysis modal — click 'Close' or press Esc to return
titleTooltip: Source range and analysis mode for this run
gestureHint: scroll = X zoom · drag = X pan + Y zoom · hover = vertical cursor + readout
maxPeriodTooltip: Excludes any peak whose period exceeds this many seconds; 600s (10 min) is the default since PE worm cycles are typically well below that.
noPeaks: No periodogram peaks under {{seconds}}s detected. Try raising the max-period filter or check the signal.
peakTitle: Peak {{index}}: a periodic-error component at {{period}}s period
